events.name: SELECTION
events.description: Selection change event name (emits UI:{selectionEvent} with { selectedIds: string[] })

events.name: LOAD_MORE
events.description: Event emitted when more items needed: UI:{loadMoreEvent}

events.name: VIEW
events.description: User opened a record from the list.

events.name: DataGridLoaded
events.description: DataGrid rows finished loading; payload.data holds the collection.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Accepts
overridableConfigKeys.description: When set, the container accepts drops whose dragGroup matches this value (or '*' for any group)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Class Name
overridableConfigKeys.description: Additional CSS classes

overridableConfigKeys.label: Cols
overridableConfigKeys.description: Number of columns (uses auto-fit if omitted)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Columns
overridableConfigKeys.description: Alias for `fields` — the compiler emits `columns` for field defs.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Dnd Item Id Field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Row field used as the @dnd-kit draggable id (default 'id')

overridableConfigKeys.label: Dnd Root
overridableConfigKeys.description: Mark this container as the DnD root for its subtree — descendant zones share one DndContext (cross-container drag). Use on an outer container whose own items are not draggable.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Drag Group
overridableConfigKeys.description: When set, items in this container are draggable and announce this group as their source

overridableConfigKeys.label: Drop Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Bus event fired on cross-container drop. Payload: { id, sourceGroup, targetGroup, newIndex }

overridableConfigKeys.label: Error
overridableConfigKeys.description: Error state

overridableConfigKeys.label: Fields
overridableConfigKeys.description: Field definitions for rendering each card. The pattern contract in `@almadar/patterns` documents `columns` as the wire-format alias the compiler emits — both names resolve to the same shape here. Pass either.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Gap
overridableConfigKeys.description: Gap between cards

overridableConfigKeys.label: Has More
overridableConfigKeys.description: Whether more items are available for infinite scroll

overridableConfigKeys.label: Image Field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity field name containing an image URL for card thumbnails

overridableConfigKeys.label: Infinite Scroll
overridableConfigKeys.description: Enable infinite scroll loading

overridableConfigKeys.label: Is Loading
overridableConfigKeys.description: Loading state

overridableConfigKeys.label: Load More Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Event emitted when more items needed: UI:{loadMoreEvent}

overridableConfigKeys.label: Look
overridableConfigKeys.description: Layer 2 visual treatment — mirrors the `entity-table` look enum so data-grid / data-list / entity-table share one knob name from authors.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Max Inline Actions
overridableConfigKeys.description: Max inline primary action buttons before the rest collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Omit = all inline.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Min Card Width
overridableConfigKeys.description: Minimum card width in pixels (used when cols is not set, default 280)

overridableConfigKeys.label: Page Size
overridableConfigKeys.description: Max items to show before 'Show More' button. Defaults to 0 (disabled).

overridableConfigKeys.label: Position Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Bus event fired N times per drop (one per item in affected zones) so the trait can persist new positions for the WHOLE zone, not just the moved item. Payload: { id, position }

overridableConfigKeys.label: Reorder Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Bus event fired on in-container reorder. Payload: { id, oldIndex, newIndex }

overridableConfigKeys.label: Scroll X
overridableConfigKeys.description: Lay items in a single horizontally-scrolling row (kanban columns) sized to `minCardWidth` instead of a wrapping grid.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Selectable
overridableConfigKeys.description: Enable multi-select with checkboxes

overridableConfigKeys.label: Selection Event
overridableConfigKeys.description: Selection change event name (emits UI:{selectionEvent} with { selectedIds: string[] })

overridableConfigKeys.label: Sortable
overridableConfigKeys.description: Enable in-container reorder; items can be dragged to new positions among siblings
